meaning: n.猫,小姑娘,少女n.脸,(尤指撅起的)嘴
examples: Puss in Boots arrived at a stately castle.
Hearing the wheels on the drawbridge, Puss in Boots hastened out.
Some highlights of the film involve Shrek being gross, Fiona being tough, Donkey talking endlessly, Puss being fat.
The film itself opens to Puss tip-toeing quietly away from a one-night-stand with another cat.
Against this background DreamWorks is set to release its second new movie of 2011: Puss in Boots.
